event: Pittsburgh Riverhounds lost 2-1 to expansion side Sporting Jacksonville, who were winless on the season entering the match.
Pittsburgh Riverhounds host Louisville City FC in a nationally televised CBS match at F.N.B. Stadium; result pending at time of publication.
Louisville City FC (7-5-3) travel to Pittsburgh for a nationally televised CBS match; Jansen Wilson leads the team with 10 goals in all competitions; result pending.
Sporting Jacksonville defeated defending champion Pittsburgh Riverhounds 2-1 for one of their first wins of the 2026 season.
FC Tulsa lost 3-1 to Birmingham Legion FC in the Prinx Tires USL Cup, conceding 32 shots — the third-most in club history across all competitions.
FC Tulsa host El Paso Locomotive FC in a Western Conference match at ONEOK Field; result pending at time of publication.
El Paso Locomotive FC visit FC Tulsa leading the Western Conference in goals scored (25) and goals allowed (24); Rubio Rubín leads with 8 goals and 4 assists.
Las Vegas Lights FC transferred forward Nighte Pickering to St. Louis CITY2.
Sacramento Republic FC signed experienced attacker Alfredo Midence.
Wilton Rancheria and Sacramento Republic FC announced Republic Stadium at The Railyards will be built as a 20,000+ seat soccer-first venue, forgoing phased expansion, targeting a 2028 opening.
Fort Wayne FC extended their unbeaten run in USL League One to 11 matches following a 3-0 win over Spokane Velocity FC, with Taig Healy scoring his ninth goal of the season.
Fort Wayne FC drew 4,500 fans to Ruoff Mortgage Stadium for their 3-0 win over Spokane Velocity FC.
Fort Wayne FC host Greenville Triumph SC at Ruoff Mortgage Stadium; result pending at time of publication.
Spokane Velocity FC lost 0-3 to Fort Wayne FC in USL League One regular season play.
Vermont Green FC hosted Ironbound SC in the USL League Two Playoffs Round of 32 at a sold-out Virtue Field, carrying a 37-match unbeaten streak and 13W-1D-0L regular season record into the match.
Vermont Green FC's Round of 32 USL League Two playoff match against Ironbound SC sold out at Virtue Field in Burlington.
Ironbound SC (8W-4D-0L regular season) played Vermont Green FC in the USL League Two Playoffs Round of 32 at Virtue Field; result pending.
Lionsbridge FC hosted Asheville City SC in the USL League Two Playoffs Quarterfinal at TowneBank Stadium, Newport News; result pending.
Lionsbridge FC finished the USL League Two regular season as Chesapeake Division leaders with 34 points and a +32 goal differential.
North Carolina FC dropped out of the USL Championship following the 2025 season and went on hiatus, with the stated goal of entering USL Premier in 2028 with a new stadium in Raleigh.
